basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website https://www.iitmandi.ac.in. The IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for the post of Research Associate (RA). (The total number of vacancies has not been specified in the official notification.)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation may be relaxed for deserving applicants or as per institute or GoI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD (awarded or thesis submitted) in relevant areas of Materials Science/Mechanical Engineering/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science or Technology/Manufacturing Science or Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology/Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics/Instrumentation or equivalent, ME/M.Tech or master's degree in relevant area + 5 years industrial or research experience
qualification.details: PhD (awarded or thesis submitted) in Materials Science/Mechanical Engineering/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science or Technology/Manufacturing Science or Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology/Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics/Instrumentation or equivalent OR ME/M.Tech or master's degree + 5 years industrial/research experience. Desirable: 1-3 years experience in additive manufacturing (polymer/metal/ceramic), material characterization, process simulation, software interface.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_mandi_iit: PhD (awarded or thesis submitted) in relevant areas of Materials Science/Mechanical Engineering/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science or Technology/Manufacturing Science or Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology/Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics/Instrumentation or equivalent, ME/M.Tech or master's degree in relevant area + 5 years industrial or research experience

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD (awarded or thesis submitted) in Materials Science/Mechanical Engineering/Functionalization Materials/Polymer Science or Technology/Manufacturing Science or Technology/Software for additive manufacturing or interface of Nano-Science-Technology/Material Chemistry/Physics/Electronics/Microelectronics/Instrumentation or equivalent OR ME/M.Tech or master's degree + 5 years industrial/research experience. Desirable: 1-3 years experience in additive manufacturing (polymer/metal/ceramic), material characterization, process simulation, software interface.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation may be relaxed for deserving applicants or as per institute or GoI norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate (RA) position at IIT Mandi is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a PhD in relevant fields or a Master's degree with 5 years of industrial/research experience. Specific disciplines are listed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate (RA) position is 50 years. Age relaxation may be provided as per norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) role?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Research Associate (RA) position ranges from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 55,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi Research Associate (RA) positions?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which can be conducted either offline or online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate (RA) position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Mandi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi is located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 175075.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any desirable qualifications for the Research Associate (RA) role?
faq.answer: Yes, 1-3 years of experience in additive manufacturing, material characterization, process simulation, or software interface is considered desirable.
